data.en: I remember the things that my mum and dad said to me again and again.
data.cn: 我记得我爸爸妈妈一遍又一遍对我说过的话。
data.hint: 注意宾语从句和“一遍又一遍”的表达。
accept: The things that my mum and dad said to me again and again I remember.

data.en: If I have to come over there, you won't be happy to see me!
data.cn: 如果我不得不走过去，你见到我不会高兴的！
data.hint: If条件句：If + 一般现在时, 主句用will/won't。
accept: You won't be happy to see me if I have to come over there!

data.en: Did your parents ever say things like that to you?
data.cn: 你父母曾经对你说过那样的话吗？
data.hint: 一般过去时的疑问句。

data.en: My little brother and me, we loved TV and we sat and watched it for hours every day.
data.cn: 我和我的小弟弟，我们喜欢电视，每天坐着看好几个小时。
data.hint: 注意过去式和“看好几个小时”。
accept: We loved TV and we sat and watched it for hours every day, my little brother and me.

data.en: If you watch TV all the time, you'll get square eyes.
data.cn: 如果你一直看电视，你的眼睛会变方（视疲劳）。
data.hint: If条件句：If + 一般现在时, 主句用'll。
accept: You'll get square eyes if you watch TV all the time.

data.en: Well, we watched a lot of TV and our eyes are still normal.
data.cn: 嗯，我们看了很多电视，我们的眼睛仍然正常。
data.hint: 注意对照：过去看了很多，现在仍然正常。
accept: Our eyes are still normal and we watched a lot of TV, well.

data.en: If you sit too close to the TV, you'll go blind.
data.cn: 如果你坐得离电视太近，你会变瞎的。
data.hint: If引导的条件句。
accept: You'll go blind if you sit too close to the TV.

data.en: If you eat all your carrots, you'll see in the dark!
data.cn: 如果你吃掉所有的胡萝卜，你就能在黑暗中看见东西！
data.hint: If条件句：If + 主语 + 动词原形。
accept: You'll see in the dark if you eat all your carrots!

data.en: I ate them when I was a kid and I eat them now.
data.cn: 我小时候吃它们，现在也吃。
data.hint: 注意过去时与现在时的对比。
accept: When I was a kid I ate them and I eat them now.

data.en: But I still can't see in the dark!
data.cn: 但我仍然不能在黑暗中看见东西！
data.hint: can't 表示能力。

data.en: I always liked doing dangerous things - climbing trees and things.
data.cn: 我总是喜欢做危险的事情——爬树之类的。
data.hint: like doing sth. 喜欢做某事。
accept: Climbing trees and things - I always liked doing dangerous things.

data.en: If you fall, you'll break your leg.
data.cn: 如果你摔倒了，你会摔断腿。
data.hint: First conditional.
accept: You'll break your leg if you fall.

data.en: And when you break your leg, don't come running to me for help!
data.cn: 当你摔断腿的时候，别跑来找我帮忙！
data.hint: when引导的时间状语从句，后接祈使句。
accept: Don't come running to me for help when you break your leg!

data.en: I didn't understand the joke for years!
data.cn: 好多年我都没听懂那个笑话！
data.hint: didn't + 动词原形。
accept: For years I didn't understand the joke!

data.en: OK here's another one, and I think every child in the world hears this.
data.cn: 好，这儿还有一个，我想世界上每个孩子都听过这个。
data.hint: here is... 这是一个...。
accept: Every child in the world hears this, I think, and here's another one.

data.en: If I was angry or upset, I always made a face.
data.cn: 如果我生气或心烦，我总是做鬼脸。
data.hint: make a face 做鬼脸。
accept: I always made a face if I was angry or upset.

data.en: If you go on making that face, the wind will change and your face will stay like that forever!
data.cn: 如果你继续做那个鬼脸，风向会变，你的脸就会永远保持那样了！
data.hint: go on doing 继续做某事；stay like that 保持那样。
accept: The wind will change and your face will stay like that forever if you go on making that face!

data.en: As soon as I think of others, I'll send them to you!
data.cn: 我一想到其他的，就会发给你！
data.hint: as soon as 一...就...。
accept: I'll send them to you as soon as I think of others!

data.en: Use the first conditional to talk about possible events and their future results.
data.cn: 使用第一条件句来谈论可能的事件及其未来的结果。
data.hint: talk about 谈论。
accept: To talk about possible events and their future results use the first conditional.

data.en: If I see Jane, I'll tell her.
data.cn: 如果我见到简，我会告诉她。
data.hint: 主将从现。
accept: I'll tell her if I see Jane.

data.en: If I'm late, my parents will be angry.
data.cn: 如果我迟到了，我父母会生气的。
data.hint: 注意be动词在if从句和主句中的用法。
accept: My parents will be angry if I'm late.

data.en: If I remember, I'll bring it to school tomorrow.
data.cn: 如果我记得，我明天会把它带到学校。
data.hint: bring... to... 把...带到...。
accept: I'll bring it to school tomorrow if I remember.

data.en: If you come to the party, you'll meet Jake.
data.cn: 如果你来参加聚会，你会见到杰克。
data.hint: meet 遇见。
accept: You'll meet Jake if you come to the party.

data.en: We'll go to the beach if it doesn't rain tomorrow.
data.cn: 如果明天不下雨，我们就去海滩。
data.hint: 注意if从句中的否定形式doesn't rain。
accept: If it doesn't rain tomorrow, we'll go to the beach.

data.en: I won't feel better if I don't go to the concert tonight.
data.cn: 如果我不去参加今晚的音乐会，我不会感觉好些。
data.hint: 主句和从句都用否定形式。
accept: If I don't go to the concert tonight, I won't feel better.

data.en: When I see Martin, I'll give him your message.
data.cn: 当我见到马丁时，我会把你的信息传达给他。
data.hint: when引导的时间状语从句。
accept: I'll give him your message when I see Martin.

data.en: If there's a good film on, I'll probably go to the cinema.
data.cn: 如果有部好电影上映，我可能会去电影院。
data.hint: be on 上映；probably 可能。
accept: I'll probably go to the cinema if there's a good film on.

data.en: Let's go out in the evening, when it's cooler.
data.cn: 让我们晚上出去吧，那时候凉爽些。
data.hint: when引导定语从句或时间状语从句。
accept: When it's cooler, let's go out in the evening.

data.en: You can watch some TV when you finish your homework.
data.cn: 当你完成作业时，你可以看一会儿电视。
data.hint: finish one's homework 完成作业。
accept: When you finish your homework, you can watch some TV.

data.en: I'll be very happy if my team wins.
data.cn: 如果我的球队赢了，我会非常高兴。
data.hint: wins 注意三单形式。
accept: If my team wins, I'll be very happy.

data.en: Looks like they're having a good time.
data.cn: 看起来他们玩得很开心。
data.hint: have a good time 玩得开心。
accept: It looks like they're having a good time.

data.en: Well, we all know what that's like - your parents shouting at you.
data.cn: 嗯，我们都知道那是怎么回事——你父母冲你大喊大叫。
data.hint: know what... is like 知道...是什么样子的。
accept: Your parents shouting at you - well, we all know what that's like.

data.en: He's got a big business meeting he has to attend.
data.cn: 他有个大型商务会议必须参加。
data.hint: have to do sth. 必须做某事；attend 参加。
accept: He has to attend a big business meeting that he's got.

data.en: Well, I think you should know.
data.cn: 嗯，我想你应该知道。
data.hint: should 应该。
accept: I think you should know, well.

data.en: But I know one thing: he shouts at me all the time.
data.cn: 但我知道一件事：他一直对我大喊大叫。
data.hint: shout at 对...大喊；all the time 一直。
accept: He shouts at me all the time, but I know one thing.

data.en: Everything I do is wrong.
data.cn: 我做的每件事都是错的。
data.hint: everything I do 我做的每件事。

data.en: Another few years and I can leave home!
data.cn: 再过几年我就可以离开家了！
data.hint: another few years 再过几年；leave home 离家。
accept: I can leave home and another few years!

data.en: When we're parents, we'll be just the same as our parents.
data.cn: 当我们成为父母时，我们会和我们的父母一模一样。
data.hint: the same as 与...一样。
accept: We'll be just the same as our parents when we're parents.

data.en: What is it? I'm in the park.
data.cn: 什么事？我在公园里。
data.hint: in the park 在公园。
accept: I'm in the park, what is it?

data.en: Dad, say that again. What? The hospital? Mum?
data.cn: 爸爸，再说一遍。什么？医院？妈妈？
data.hint: say that again 再说一遍。
accept: Say that again, Dad. What? Mum? The hospital?

data.en: What I want to say is...
data.cn: 我想说的是……
data.hint: What引导主语从句。

data.en: I really don't care.
data.cn: 我真的不在乎。
data.hint: care 在乎。
accept: Really I don't care.

data.en: Here's what I think...
data.cn: 这是我的想法……
data.hint: Here is... 这是...。
accept: What I think is here...

data.en: I hope it happens very soon.
data.cn: 我希望它很快就会发生。
data.hint: hope 希望；happen 发生。
accept: Very soon I hope it happens.

data.en: We could go together, if that's OK with you.
data.cn: 如果我们能一起去，如果你不介意的话。
data.hint: be OK with you 你觉得可以。
accept: If that's OK with you, we could go together.

data.en: Joe's upstairs - he's doing his homework.
data.cn: 乔在楼上——他正在做作业。
data.hint: upstairs 楼上；doing his homework 正在做作业。
accept: He's doing his homework - Joe's upstairs.

data.en: Did you do well in your exam?
data.cn: 你考试考得好吗？
data.hint: do well in 在...中表现出色。
accept: In your exam did you do well?

data.en: They do great ice cream at the new café.
data.cn: 那家新咖啡馆的冰淇淋很棒。
data.hint: do sth. 提供/做某物。
accept: At the new café they do great ice cream.

data.en: I'm sorry to hear that.
data.cn: 听到那个消息我很遗憾。
data.hint: sympathising 同情/安慰。

data.en: But it means I can't go out with you guys on Friday.
data.cn: 但这意味着周五我不能和你们一起出去了。
data.hint: go out with 和...出去；on Friday 在周五。
accept: On Friday I can't go out with you guys, but it means.
